notes: v0.11.0 — TEST mode. Nowa zakladka TEST w nav rail (sekcja CONFIG). 2 kafle: DOODLE SKETCHBOOK i POP ART COMIC. Klikasz kafel - startuje practice match (no rewards) z wybranym stylem. Po koncu match-u modal Which style felt better z 2 buttonami: VOTE DOODLE / VOTE POP ART (+ SKIP). Vote zapisywany do user settings (style_votes). Studio zbierze z save'ow testerow. DOODLE = krayonowe statki z wobbly ink outline, pencil-mark trail, hatched shading. POP ART = bold black outline + halftone dots + comic shine + striped HP bar. Gameplay bez zmian, tylko warstwa renderowania - apples-to-apples test.
